commands: vp migrate --no-interactive --no-hooks # `vite` is rewritten to vite-plus only in config entry files; every other file keeps its `vite` imports (issue #2004)
cat vite.config.ts # REWRITTEN: the config entry's `defineConfig` import becomes vite-plus
cat packages/app/src/main.ts # PRESERVED: a normal app's non-config `vite` import (createServer, typeof import) stays on vite
cat packages/vite-plugin-demo/index.ts # PRESERVED: a vite-plugin-* package keeps `from 'vite'` so it stays usable by plain-vite projects
cat packages/unplugin-demo/src/index.ts # PRESERVED: an unplugin-* package keeps `from 'vite'` too
